summary: Frontend-only test for Dashboard date-filtered Booked ribbon. Logged in as owner, created 2 day_use bookings via API (1 for today + 1 for +5 days) on truly-free rooms, then validated every required behavior in Dashboard.jsx. All 5 scenarios from the review request PASSED.

test_results.STEP5_click_HariIni_resets_state: PASS (date back to today, banner removed, btn hidden, Room A brown again)
test_results.cleanup: Both test bookings DELETEd via API (HTTP 200)

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx filter logic in useMemo bookingsOnDate correctly compares Date(jam_mulai..jam_selesai) against local day boundaries [00:00..23:59]; handles UTC ISO strings from backend properly.
Edge case verified: same room, 2 day_use bookings on different dates correctly toggle visibility based on filterDate without affecting each other.
Date picker uses native browser <input type=date>; this is acceptable but could be replaced with shadcn DatePicker for visual consistency with the rest of the app. NOT a blocker.
Auto-refresh interval (30s in load()) does NOT reset filterDate — good, user-selected date persists across refreshes.
seed_data_creation: 2 temporary bookings created via POST /api/bookings on rooms with no prior booking, both DELETEd at end of test (status -> 'dibatalkan').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard date-filter feature is fully working. data-testids verified: dashboard-filter-date, dashboard-filter-today, filter-date-banner, room-grid, room-<nomor>. Token key in localStorage is 'ph_token' (not 'token'). Login form has no data-testid; use first 2 <input> elements and button name='Masuk'. Backend stores booking jam_mulai/jam_selesai as UTC ISO; frontend converts to local for comparison with filterDate day window — works correctly for cross-day bookings.
